scope: cumulative review of stages 3-27 (Tier 1-4 stages 3-22 + Tier 5 stages 23-27); stages 1-2 reviewed previously in v1, v2

findings.summary: public List<Assembly> Assemblies has no Add/Remove discipline on Registry; mutated freely while EnsureInitialized reads it under _initLock. Zero external mutators in production today, so latent.

Console.Out.Write(console.ToString()) bypasses Channels — the very discipline the branch is enforcing. Run() is already async and Context.App is in scope; should route through app.CurrentActor.Channels.WriteTextAsync(Output, ...).

Console.OpenStandardOutput/Error/Input() in WireDefaultConsoleChannels. Stream acquisition, not writes, and is the legitimate channel-bootstrap path. CLAUDE.md's permitted-exceptions list could be tightened to name this case.

carryover.summary: Snapshot back-ref aliasing — latent, untouched, out of scope.
// Stage 1: stale migration-history comment at Channels/this.cs:61. Trivial.
AppThis_SerializersExists_PerActor under-asserts distinctness — out of scope.
